executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to missing or inaccessible workflow file. The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) could not be found in the repository, resulting in HTTP 404 errors across all build attempts. This is a critical configuration issue preventing any build execution.

errors.title: Workflow File Not Found - GitHub Actions Dispatch Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path (.github/workflows/build.yml) or the repository/branch configuration is incorrect.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.location: Repository: loginkarun/scib_demo, Branch: main, Expected Path: .github/workflows/build.yml
errors.root_cause: The workflow file build.yml does not exist in the .github/workflows/ directory of the scib_demo repository on the main branch. Alternative causes include: (1) GitHub Actions disabled for the repository, (2) Insufficient token permissions to access workflows, (3) Incorrect workflow file name or path.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or the configuration is corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Missing GitHub Actions Workflow Configuration
errors.description: The repository lacks the required GitHub Actions workflow configuration file that defines the build process. Without this file, automated builds cannot be triggered or executed.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The build.yml workflow file has not been created in the repository, or it exists in a different location/branch than expected. The workflow dispatch API cannot locate the file to execute.
errors.impact: Prevents automated build execution, continuous integration, and deployment automation. Manual intervention required to create and configure the workflow file.

errors.title: Empty Action URL - No Build Run Initiated
errors.description: The action_url field is empty in all build failure logs, indicating that no GitHub Actions workflow run was successfully initiated. This prevents log retrieval and detailed error analysis.
errors.error_message: action_url is empty - no workflow run created
errors.root_cause: Since the workflow dispatch request failed with 404, GitHub Actions never created a workflow run, resulting in no run ID or action URL being generated.
errors.impact: Unable to retrieve detailed build logs from GitHub Actions API. Error analysis limited to workflow dispatch failure metadata only.

recommendations.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in the scib_demo repository on the main branch. This file should define the build process including checkout, dependency installation, compilation, testing, and artifact generation.
recommendations.automated_fix: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven/Gradle build configuration.

recommendations.description: Ensure the GitHub token has sufficient permissions to access and trigger workflows. Required scopes: workflow, repo, actions:read, actions:write.
recommendations.automated_fix: Review token permissions in GitHub settings and regenerate token if necessary with correct scopes.

recommendations.description: Verify that GitHub Actions is enabled for the scib_demo repository. Check repository settings > Actions > General to ensure Actions are allowed.
recommendations.automated_fix: Navigate to repository settings and enable GitHub Actions if disabled.

compliance_notes.audit_trail: All three build attempts (1, 2, 3) failed with identical HTTP 404 errors, indicating persistent configuration issue rather than transient failure.
compliance_notes.remediation_status: PENDING - Requires manual creation of workflow file or repository configuration correction.
compliance_notes.risk_assessment: HIGH - Complete CI/CD pipeline outage. No automated builds, tests, or deployments possible until resolved.
